siteTagline: Zareoon — a secure bridge from production to consumption
siteIntro: Zareoon is an online marketplace for various products, connecting producers, suppliers, and buyers directly.
accountPageSubtitle: Manage your personal details, contact information, and account security.
changePasswordHint: Fill in the fields below only if you want to change your password.
photoHint: PNG, JPG or WEBP — max 10 MB
accountDocumentsHint: Upload identity documents and required files.
noFilesUploaded: You have not uploaded any files yet.
latestAvailableInCategory: Latest available products in this category
browseByCategoryHint: Choose a category above to browse subcategories and products step by step.
noProductsWithStock: No products with stock right now.
adTitle: Make sure of your goods quality before import or export.
adDescription: Arya Foolad Gharn reduces your trade risks and ensures compliance with required standards through cargo inspection, quality control, raw material inspection, industrial equipment inspection, and valid certification services.
adFooter: Arya Foolad Gharn Engineering Inspection Company; your trusted partner in international trade.
lcDescription: If you need an LC for import or export, entrust opening, follow-up, and execution to us with confidence.
lcFooter: Final agreement and execution always remain with the parties.
escrowTitle: Deal guarantee, escrow & letter of credit (LC)
escrowDescription: Optional tools to help users coordinate; using them does not make Zareoon a party to the deal.
escrowBlockHint: Optional tool — final responsibility with the parties
escrowItem1: Deposit calculation and management per deal terms
escrowItem2: Secure holding of funds until agreed milestones are confirmed
escrowItem3: Milestone release after obligations are completed
escrowItem4: Parties can record a dispute; final resolution remains with the users
escrowExampleText: Example: the buyer places the agreed amount in escrow; funds are held until deal milestones are confirmed and released per the parties’ agreement.
escrowFooter: Using these tools does not make Zareoon a party to the deal.
lcBlockHint: Optional facilitation — responsibility with the parties
lcSectionIntro: For international deals, LC-related features only help users coordinate; final responsibility remains with the parties, including:
zareoonServicesLiabilityNote: Full responsibility for the deal, payment, and obligations always stays with buyer and seller; Zareoon has no liability.
lcFormRequiredError: Full name and phone are required
lcFormSubmitError: Failed to submit request. Please try again.
lcFormSuccessMessage: Zareoon specialists will contact you as soon as possible.
tradeProviderRegisterDesc: Choose your field, create your profile and appear in the directory after approval.
tradeProviderRegisterSuccess: Your application has been submitted. Your profile will appear after review.
tradeProviderIntroQuestion: Can you provide services in international trade?
tradeProviderIntroDesc: If yes, choose your services, add your company or professional details, and after approval your dedicated page will appear in the services directory — similar to a seller shop page.
tradeProviderSuccessHint: After admin approval, your dedicated page will appear in the services directory.
tradeServicesJoinBanner: Introduce your services, find new clients and join the international trade network with your dedicated profile.
buyerSellerPortalAria: Your shop and public page on Zareoon
buyerSellerPortalSectionDesc: Be a seller or service provider; create a public page with a dedicated link so customers can see your products or services, contact you, and follow you.
buyerSellerPortalFriendlyNote: Example URL: zareoon.ir/your-shop — replace your-shop with your English shop name.
buyerSellerPortalShopPoint1: Showcase products and stock on one shareable link
buyerSellerPortalShopPoint2: Followers, direct contact, and messaging with buyers
buyerSellerPortalShopPoint3: Publish ads and update supply from the same page
buyerSellerPortalServicePoint1: Present expertise, licenses, and service scope with a dedicated link
buyerSellerPortalServicePoint2: Appear in the services directory and attract partnership requests
buyerSellerPortalServicePoint3: Connect directly with domestic and international clients
buyerSellerPortalBuyerTitle: Submit a product or trade-service requirement
buyerSellerPortalBuyerDesc: Post what you need so sellers and trade-service providers on Zareoon can respond.
buyerSellerPortalBuyerCta: Submit a purchase or service request
buyerSellerPortalSellerTitle: I'm a seller or service provider
buyerSellerPortalSellerDesc: Create your page, list products or services, and connect with customers.
buyerSellerPortalSellerCta: Create a shop or services page on Zareoon
buyerSellerPortalHint: You can be a seller, service provider, and applicant at the same time.
dashboardPersonaSellerHint: To sell products, create your shop first.
dashboardPersonaSellerHintBefore: To sell products, create your shop first.
dashboardPersonaSellerHintAfter: Manage your products and track customer orders.
dashboardPersonaProviderHint: To offer services, create your services page first.
dashboardPersonaProviderHintBefore: To offer services, create your services page first.
dashboardPersonaProviderHintAfter: Manage your services and track customer requests.
mobileSearchHint: Filter by all, hashtag, product type, or available listings
mobileSearchActiveHint: Type = catalog category · Available = each seller listing separately
mobileSearchNoExplore: No listings to show right now
mobileSearchFilterTypesDesc: Browse catalog categories to pick a product type
mobileSearchFilterListingsDesc: Active seller listings you can order now
mobileSearchNoResultsHint: Try product type name, #hashtag, or seller listing title
tradeServicesCategoriesDesc: Each card is a specialty area — browse providers or request cooperation.
tradeServicesSubcategoriesDesc: Select a sub-service to show only companies and specialists that offer it.
tradeServicesProvidersDesc: Companies and specialists with profiles, licenses, experience and ratings.
tradeServicesNoProvidersForFilter: No providers for this sub-service yet. Switch the filter to All or try another option.
tradeServicesNoProvidersYet: No providers listed yet. You can submit a cooperation request.
tradeProviderProfileNameHint: From your profile — cannot be changed
tradeProviderVipMessage: This is a VIP section. Membership is not available.
tradeProviderVipCategoryLocked: Services in this category cannot be selected for new membership.
tradeProviderSelectServicesHint: No limit — pick any number from any category.
agriculturalProductsDesc: A complete range of products and goods from various suppliers
requestedItemsInCart: Request submitted - {count} items are currently in your cargo list
cartReservationNote: Sending a request does not reserve stock automatically; the seller reviews it and next steps continue after approval.
toastLoginRequired: Please log in to your account to continue.
inventoryOverviewDesc: Total stock for this product and how much you can order
inventoryOverviewShort: Per-grade details are in the offers section
gradeBreakdownDesc: Compare available stock for each quality grade
offersSectionDesc: Enter a quantity and add it to your cart
selectSupplierHint: Select a supplier to view their media and loading location
gradeMediaDesc: Photos and videos below belong to this quality grade only
gradeMediaHeroHint: Each grade's photos and videos are shown in the offers section
noGradeMedia: No photos or videos uploaded for this grade yet
swipeMediaHint: Swipe to view photos and videos
noMediaToShow: There is no media to display.
youHaveInCart: You currently have {quantity} {unit} of this product in your cart.
catalogGuidePanelAriaLabel: Category, product and card color guide
selectConversation: Select a conversation or start a new one
stockLegendTitle: Card colors are based on available stock (kilograms):
categoryProductGuideIntro: Each item in a card is marked with one of these labels:
categoryProductGuideCategory: A group that still has subcategories or varieties — open the next level to reach the final item.
categoryProductGuideProduct: The final orderable item — submit your request directly from that page.
footerSecureTagline: A secure platform for direct connection between sellers and buyers
siteAddress: Iran, Khuzestan, Ahvaz, Kouy-e Mellat (Kourosh), 20 Eqbal, 1st alley, No. 7
mobileSheetTitle: What would you like to do?
mobileSheetSubtitle: Submit a request, list a product for sale, or register your services.
mobileSheetRequestProductDesc: Need goods? Post a request so sellers can respond.
mobileSheetRequestServiceDesc: Need trade services? Submit a service request.
mobileSheetSellHeading: Sell a product or offer services
mobileSheetSellProductDesc: List your product for sale in your shop.
mobileSheetCreateShopFirstDesc: To sell products, create your shop page first.
